'''Deena Mipps''' was a [[Noble/Legends|noblewoman]]-turned-[[Journalist/Legends|journalist]]<ref name="CCW" /> who worked for [[Darpa SectorNet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="GNN3" /> She was also a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cell leader and [[Spy/Legends|spy]].<ref name="CCW" />

Mipps covered the local events on [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]] and their relations to the [[blockade of Ralltiir]].<ref name="GNN3" /> She also covered the Esselian political situation in the wake of the [[rawmat shortage of 1–2 ABY]], including the [[Esselian Hall election, 2 ABY|Esselian Hall election]] held during the New Year [[Fete Week]] of [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].<ref name="GNN8">{{JournalCite|8|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref>

Intent on exposing an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] plot to raise security taxes by clandestinely instigating "riots" among [[Alien/Legends|non-Humans]], Mipps brings in a group of Rebels and secretly filmed the conference.<ref name="CCW" />
